steps.title: Recognize the Two-Part Requirement
steps.content: The task demands presenting both “the study and its methodology”—the researcher's goal/identity AND the research method used (computer simulations).

steps.title: Identify Which Choice Includes the Methodology
steps.content:
Choice B is the only option that explicitly names the research method: “used computer simulations to study the effect of the mother duck's wake.” Choices A, C, and D focus on findings or the general topic without specifying how the study was conducted.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
